workflow_stage_pattern: Open encounter through Ready to final bill
window_rule: Current stage occurs before final bill and before local timing window expiry
financial_meaning: Work is still financially recoverable before billing finalization

workflow_stage_pattern: Final billed or Correction / rebill pending with open correction pathway
window_rule: Final bill has occurred but correction or rebill remains within the allowed window
financial_meaning: Work may still be financially recoverable through correction

workflow_stage_pattern: Expired correction or missed pre-final-bill timing window
window_rule: Correction pathway has expired or pre-final-bill recovery window has closed
financial_meaning: Work is no longer financially recoverable

workflow_stage_pattern: Closed or resolved account with residual support concern
window_rule: Financial recovery is closed but compliance or audit relevance remains
financial_meaning: No further financial recovery but issue may still matter for monitoring
